description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 5 times to a random enemy and inflicts Shock. Enemies in Shock are stunned for [3 sec->1.8 sec].
For 6 sec, restores HP every 1 sec. You cannot take other actions while the skill is active, but all allies' Magic Damage taken is reduced by [(added) 25%].
For [15 sec -> 7 sec], increases all allies' Attack, Attack Speed by [350 -> 42%], and Critical Hit Chance by [350 -> 420].

Deals Magic Damage to 4 enemies, then inflicts Shock for 20 sec. On a critical hit, stuns them for [1 sec->0.6 sec]. For each enemy in Shock, damage taken by you is reduced by 15%, up to 3 stacks. Shock: For 20 sec, deals continuous Magic Damage equal to 25% of Attack Power every 1 sec.

dark.unified: For 10 sec, the target's Magic Damage taken is increased by [25%->30%].

light.unified: You are immune to status ailments while casting.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], and each heal additionally restores 5% of the target's Max HP.

light.unified: Restores [1 orb->1000] Mana to all allies.

dark.unified: If the number of enemies is [3 or less -> {1} or fewer], removes the target's beneficial effects.

description.unified: [Swift Wind] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, and additionally increases Crit DMG by {0}%.

dark.unified: When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by [300->{2}%] and their Mana by [200->{3}] per sec for [5 sec->{1} sec]. This effect can only trigger once every [5 sec->{4} sec].

description.unified: On Normal Attack, has a {0}% chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by {2}% for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for 2 sec.
